---
title: "Research"
description: "Research agenda of Shunyu Wu: end-to-end optimization, decision-focused learning, forecasting and system modeling, and reliable deployment for cyber-physical systems."
---

## Research Vision

I study how **learning**, **optimization**, and **engineering constraints** can be combined into reliable decision systems. The common thread is **end-to-end optimization for cyber-physical systems**, with an emphasis on **decision-focused learning**, **forecasting and system modeling**, and deployable infrastructure intelligence.

## Research Agenda

### 1) End-to-End Optimization and Decision-Focused Learning

- Train predictive models against downstream operational objectives rather than proxy accuracy alone.
- Diagnose and stabilize training when decision maps are nonsmooth or surrogate gradients are inexact.
- Develop regret-aware objectives that better align learned representations with deployment outcomes.

### 2) Forecasting, Modeling, and Infrastructure Intelligence

- Build forecasting and system-modeling modules that respect graph structure, process physics, and operator knowledge.
- Couple learned surrogates with SCADA signals, engineering constraints, and safety rules.
- Use AI as a decision module inside real scheduling and control loops, not only as a predictor.

### 3) Reliable Optimization for Deployment

- Design constrained PtO and solver-in-the-loop methods with explicit feasibility handling.
- Integrate engineering safeguards such as feasible-set tightening, rollback, replay validation, and human oversight.
- Build reusable decision stacks for long-running operation in power and water systems.

## Current Focus (2025-2026)

- Energy-dissipation views of decision-focused training and recursive variational free-energy stabilization.
- End-to-end constrained optimization under unknown or learned constraints.
- Decision support for energy and water infrastructure with deployable forecasting and optimization modules.
- Sensor deployment, pump scheduling, and efficiency optimization with deployment feedback.

## Domain Applications

- **Thermal Power Stations**: efficiency optimization under NOx and safety limits.
- **Urban Water Utilities**: pump scheduling, anomaly-aware control, and resilient operations.

## Method and Tool Stack

- **Learning/Modeling**: PyTorch, scikit-learn, XGBoost/LightGBM, PyTorch Geometric, uncertainty-aware forecasting, graph and physics-informed modeling.
- **Optimization**: LP/MILP, stochastic optimization, constrained predict-then-optimize, solver-in-the-loop learning, Gurobi, Pyomo.
- **Deployment Engineering**: config-driven services, SCADA integration, rollback-ready release pipelines, monitoring, audit, and operator-in-the-loop safeguards.
